get.description: Returns a paginated list of backup and archive jobs with customizable page size. You can also select backup/archive types, date range, order and sort field

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of entities in one page(min 1, max 2000)

200.description: Returns a paginated list of Backups & Archives

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, startedDate isn't a valid ISO 8601 date string

post.description: Creates a backup job. You must use one of the supported backup types: full, or template. The templateId parameter is optional and should only be provided for template backups

400.description: Invalid request data provided. Examples: unsupported mode selected, or numeric values in name/description fields

409.description: Backup job is already running. You must abort it or wait for it to finish before creating another

post.description: Creates a backup Template. You can configure record selection using declarative, SOQL, or SQL filters

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, connectionId isn't a valid positive number

get.description: Returns paginated list of Templates with customizable page size

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of entities in one page(min 1, max 2000)

200.description: Returns a paginated list of Templates

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, page or limit parameters are missing
Incorrect request data is provided. For example, templateId isn't a valid number

404.description: Template not found with the provided Id

get.description: Returns paginated list of B&A Connections with customizable page size

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of entities in one page(min 1, max 2000)

200.description: Returns a paginated list of B&A Connections

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, page or limit parameters are missing

200.description: Returns the B&A Connection by Id

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, connectionId isn't a valid number

404.description: Connection not found with the provided Id

get.summary: Get Connection Id by Salesforce organization Id
get.description: Returns the B&A Connection Id by Salesforce organization Id

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, Salesforce Id has invalid length

post.description: Creates a Scheduler. You must use one of the supported scheduler types: full backup, templated backup. The templateId parameter is optional and should only be provided for template backups. Run at time should be unique. You can't create schedulers with the same time

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, connectionId or templateId isn't a valid positive number

get.description: Returns a list of B&A Schedulers for the Connection. You can also pass templateId to get Schedulers related to a specific template

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, connectionId isn't a valid number

404.description: Connection not found with the provided Id

get.description: Returns the B&A Scheduler by Id

200.description: Returns the B&A Scheduler by Id

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, connectionId or schedulerId isn't a valid number

404.description: Connection or Scheduler not found with the provided Id

409.description: Scheduler with the provided Id isn't accessible

get.description: Returns the log details as a streamable file containing program job logs. Can be used for completed or aborted jobs to review results, or for running jobs to view runtime logs

200.description: Returns the streamable file containing job logs

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, id or connectionId isn't a valid number

get.description: Returns information about job progress steps. Can be used for completed or aborted jobs to review results, or for running jobs to view runtime progress

200.description: Returns a list of work completed for every processed object. The response structure may differ based on the specific work performed in the job

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, id or connectionId isn't a valid number

patch.description: Aborts the backup or archive job

200.description: Aborts the backup or archive job

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, connectionId isn't a valid positive number

get.description: Returns the Connection settings containing information about API quota, B&A connection, and scheduler activity

400.description: Incorrect request data is provided. For example, connectionId isn't a valid number

limit.description: Limit of entities in one page(min 1, max 2000)
Limit of entities in one page(min 1, max 2000)

fields.description: A dictionary of object fields where each key is a string (field name) and value is an FieldDetailDescribeDto.

requiredRelationships.description: A dictionary of required relationships where each key is a string (field name) and the value is an array of strings (object names).

optionalRelationships.description: A dictionary of optional relationships where each key is a string (field name) and the value is an array of strings (object names).

details.description: A dictionary of object details where each key is a string and value is an ObjectDetailDescribeDto.

salesforceOrgType.description: Salesforce organization type: SANDBOX or PRODUCTION
Salesforce organization type: SANDBOX or PRODUCTION

daysOfWeek.description: Should be populated if type of repeat on equal to weekly

dayOfMonth.description: Should be populated if type of repeat on equal to monthly. Can be null if populated weekDayOfMonth

weekDayOfMonth.description: Should be populated if type of repeat on equal to monthly. Can be null if populated dayOfMonth

configuration.description: Information about frequency of scheduler, repeat and running time

jobSettings.description: Backup job settings. Should be populated for backup types of scheduler

restoreFailedCount.description: Failed count value of restore data/metadata

updateSuccessCount.description: Success update count value of restore data

updateFailedCount.description: Failed update count value of restore data
